mapper.insert: INSERT INTO order_table (product_id, product_name, quantity, total_price, status) VALUES (#{productId}, #{productName}, #{quantity}, #{totalPrice}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT id, product_id, product_name, quantity, total_price, status, create_time, update_time FROM order_table ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1000
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM order_table WHERE product_id = #{productId}
